notes: Runs well with no bugs or crashing. There is severe frame stuttering however, making the experience uncomfortable. Completed a single player level and joined and played in a multiplayer match with no crashes or broken functionality.
title: Climbey

notes: Game runs overall pretty nice but the framerate often dips to 45 FPS but is generally about 70 which is rather playable.
title: Climbey

notes: Works great with my Vive. Previously had issues with the hands not rendering and controls not working. This seems to be resolved with modern versions of Proton.
title: Climbey
